content.thinking:
The context monitor is warning that context usage is at 61%, which exceeds the 60% threshold. According to the skill, when context exceeds 85% it triggers automatic session switching. At 61%, it's just a warning - I should note this but no immediate action is required yet.

This is a cron job running the context monitor, not a user message, so I should just acknowledge it quietly. The system will handle the automatic session switch at 85%.
